overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city intersection, along a sidewalk past a distinctive orange and teal building, under an overpass, and up to an elevated pedestrian walkway on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: transitioning from asphalt street onto concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking straight through the intersection toward the far side

entered.detail: modern traffic signal pole with horizontal light bar
tall futuristic glass and steel towers dominating the skyline
distinctive multi-story building with orange and teal paneling
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide sunlit intersection in a futuristic city. The camera walks forward across the asphalt crosswalk, passing under traffic lights, and transitions onto a concrete sidewalk. Tall modern buildings rise in the distance while a distinctive orange and teal building stands prominently to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside colorful commercial building with overgrown vacant lot

events.description: overtaking a pedestrian walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, overtaking a female pedestrian

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: fenced vacant lot with tall dry grass and weeds
low concrete barrier wall along the sidewalk edge
elevated concrete walkway structure crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunlit sidewalk next to a vacant overgrown lot enclosed by concrete railings. The camera overtakes a woman pedestrian while the distinctive orange and teal building dominates the right side, growing larger as the camera approaches. An elevated pedestrian bridge becomes visible ahead against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded area beneath elevated highway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass into the shaded area beneath

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera from the shaded underpass

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and ceiling of the elevated roadway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
small blue building with metal shutters and overgrown vegetation
flight of concrete stairs leading up to the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the shadow beneath a massive concrete overpass. Graffiti covers the walls to the right while a small blue abandoned kiosk sits ahead. The camera approaches a set of concrete stairs leading upward as another pedestrian walks toward the camera from the shaded passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: ascending the concrete stairs to the elevated level
emerging from stairs onto the sunlit elevated walkway platform

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to the overpass level then walking along the elevated platform

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian platform at overpass level
modern safety railing with glass panels and metal posts
the distinctive orange and teal building now visible from elevated angle
panoramic view of futuristic towers and urban landscape

segments.scene_description: The camera climbs the concrete stairs, transitioning from the shaded underpass back into bright sunlight. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway with glass railings offering panoramic views of the surrounding futuristic cityscape. The distinctive orange and teal building is visible again from this new vantage point as the camera proceeds along the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, sunlit city intersection toward the approach of an elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins by crossing an asphalt crosswalk under traffic lights, transitioning smoothly from the open road onto a concrete sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts to pass a vacant overgrown lot enclosed by concrete railings, overtaking a pedestrian along the way. The scene then narrows as a distinctive orange and teal building dominates the right side of the frame, growing larger and more imposing with every step. Finally, the view opens up to reveal an elevated pedestrian bridge stretching across the clear blue sky ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim shadows of a concrete underpass up into the bright, open expanse of an elevated city walkway. It begins beneath a massive overpass where graffiti-covered walls and a small blue abandoned kiosk line the shaded path. As the camera approaches a set of concrete stairs, it passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction before climbing upward. The scene then transitions from the gloom of the underpass back into brilliant sunlight upon reaching the top of the stairs. Finally, the view opens onto a high platform with glass railings, revealing a panoramic cityscape and a glimpse of a distinctive orange and teal building as the camera proceeds along the walkway.
